Home / Services / Custom Cabinetry

Custom Cabinetry

Crafting custom cabinets for kitchens, bathrooms, and built-in storage solutions.

Tired of cookie-cutter cabinets that don't fit your space or style? Seattle's Best Carpentry specializes in crafting custom cabinetry that maximizes storage, enhances aesthetics, and reflects your unique taste. We design, build, and install custom cabinets for kitchens, bathrooms, home offices, and any other space where you need functional and beautiful storage.

Our process begins with a detailed consultation to understand your needs and preferences. We then create a custom design that optimizes space, incorporates your desired features, and complements your home's architectural style. We work with a variety of materials, including hardwoods, plywood, and laminates, ensuring your cabinets are both durable and visually appealing.

We use time-tested woodworking techniques to ensure that our cabinets are built to last. From dovetail joints to soft-close hinges, we pay attention to every detail. We also offer a variety of finishes, including paint, stain, and lacquer, to match your existing décor. Whether you're looking for a modern, minimalist design or a classic, traditional look, we can create custom cabinets that perfectly suit your style. From Fremont bungalows to modern condos, Seattle's Best Carpentry creates custom cabinetry to perfection.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation and Design – We discuss your needs, preferences, and budget to create a custom design.
  2. 02 Step 2: Material Selection – We help you choose the best materials for durability, aesthetics, and budget.
  3. 03 Step 3: Construction – Our skilled cabinet makers build your cabinets with precision and care.
  4. 04 Step 4: Installation – We install your cabinets with attention to detail and ensure a perfect fit.

Benefits

  • Customized Design to Fit Your Needs
  • Maximized Storage Space
  • Enhanced Aesthetics
  • Durable and Long-Lasting Construction

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of wood are best for custom cabinets?

Hardwoods like maple, cherry, and oak are popular choices for their durability and beauty. Plywood is also a good option for cabinet boxes.

How long does it take to build custom cabinets?

The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project, but most cabinet projects can be completed in 4-6 weeks.

Can you match existing cabinet styles?

Yes, we can match existing cabinet styles and finishes to create a seamless look.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with custom cabinetry? Contact us today.
